issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete. Missing required parameters: 'count' (4 cards to look at), 'reveal' (up to 1 card), and 'filter' conditions (type: Firetank Pirates OR Straw Hat Crew, cost >= 2). Current filter is 'Any' which doesn't match the card text restrictions.
Filter must specify: HasAnyType with ['Firetank Pirates', 'Straw Hat Crew'] AND cost >= 2. Current 'Any' filter is incorrect.
Missing action to place remaining cards at bottom of deck in any order. The card effect has two distinct phases: search and hand arrangement, but DSL only captures the search.
